description: TEMPLATE - TX centers to consider forbidding in clinical-adjacent labs. Units Hz. Copy selected entries into /ext/groklink/blacklist/freq_mhz.json after review. Empty active list bans nothing. Passive RX policy is separate.
comment: 403 MHz region often associated with medical telemetry research literature; 433.92 / 868 / 915 are common SRD/ISM. Do NOT copy blindly - only ban TX you must never emit under your RoE. 403 example is illustrative, not a complete hospital band plan. Confirm local spectrum policy with clinical engineering before any on-prem work.
